title: Room Full of Cheese
description:
This room is full of [b][jitter]cheese!!![/jitter][/b]

You look around to see if there are any traps and above you is... more [b]cheese[/b]. The candles in this room appear to be made of [b]cheese[/b]. The furniture is also [b]cheese[/b].
Suddenly, the door behind you slams shut.

It is made of [b]cheese[/b].

options.title: Gorge
options.description: Choose [blue]2[/blue] of [blue]8[/blue] random [gold]Common[/gold] cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

notes:
The [gold]Gorge[/gold] option draws [blue]8[/blue] random [gold]Common[/gold] cards from your character's card pool with uniform odds (no rarity modification), then lets you pick [blue]2[/blue] to add to your deck.

The [gold]Search[/gold] option deals [red]14[/red] [red]unblockable[/red] HP loss that is not affected by powers or relics.
